name: Špijuniro Golubiro
lore:
Lore of Špijuniro Golubiro
                                    


A pigeon equipped with an array of mechanical gadgets. This artwork, inspired by a Croatian foot meme, is presented with its name and description in Serboque Art.
In many of the videos, the second and third images are predominantly featured. The footage showcasing an individual who closely follows this character on Instagram or TikTok is gaining significant popularity.
Description original text
Špijuniro Golubiro, Jebeni golub kojeg šalje vlada u javnost da špijunira ljude. Mislite da vas još nije našao? Bolje vam je da se odmah idete sakriti ispod svoje male, slatke, mekane dekice.
As a Spie Uni, it is a ruined pigeon sent by the government to monitor people. Do you still think he didn't find you? It would be good to hide in your small, cozy, soft blanket.
